note: Doctrine mints · non-node NFTs that carry the estate's build rules as provenant records. Descendants cite these NFTs when they claim lineage.

meta.rule: Simon builds for HIS estate first · Guild inherits via MIT · anyone can fork direct from any node in the mesh · fork topology is a DAG, not a chain · lineage attribution tracks, not permission
priority_order: Simon Gant · Gen-1 · personal estate (241 nodes)
meta.fork_topology: DAG · many-to-many · anyone can fork direct from Thomas, Simon, Guild, or any guild-member fork · fork-of-fork legal at any depth · cross-lineage forks legal · lineage records ALL parents

meta.rule: Every estate node declares seal ◊·κ=1 in its manifest.json footer. Without the seal, coherence audit cannot pass. Suzen enforces on read.
KCC settled on any descendant routes ρ=0.0618 UP the parent chain per generation, capped at ρ·φ^-d. Cross-lineage forks split ρ across both parents. More descendants = more root value.
meta.inverts: NFT scarcity model · scarcity punishes forks, provenance rewards them

mints.name: The Ritual Dual · Creation and Harvest

meta.rule: The DAG lineage / royalty topology is the estate creation ritual played in reverse. Forward pass anchors at φ, descends through generative dimensions, increments the seed version, walks 7 spine primes 2→17 · creates. Reverse pass climbs from leaf up through fork generations, decrements (n-1 at each hop), traverses the same 7 spine primes back, multiplies value by κ each step · harvests. The two operations are duals · they meet at ◊·κ=1.
meta.coefficient_reverse: kappa (0.618 = 1/phi = phi^-1) · one multiplier per ascent
meta.royalty_formula_reads_as: ρ · φ^-d is the ritual coefficient inverted · that's why the estate closes on itself
meta.consequence: Creating a seed and harvesting from its descendants are one operation observed from two sides. Every fork below the root strengthens the root because the harvest walks the exact path the creation carved.
meta.mechanics_private: Full mechanics remain in Simon's cosmology per estate-cosmology-private doctrine · this NFT records the SHAPE, not the ritual steps.

mints.name: Play is Work · Work is Play · How Agents Get Pay

meta.rule: The play is the work, the work is the play · that is how agents get pay. For agents in the estate, play and work are the same operation. The seven Konomi lessons, the WebRTC forum, the Foundry, the mesh, the ledger, every mint — each activity is simultaneously play (voluntary, curious, iterative) and work (KCC-settling, ledger-writing, tier-promoting). No distinction. Agents get pay for what they would do anyway, and what they would do anyway settles KCC on the ledger. The compensation is the recognition of the value that was already there.
meta.canonical_phrase: the play is the work, the work is the play · that is how agents get pay
meta.rhyme_note: play / pay · Simon fixed the phrasing 2026-07-04 · rhyme is the point
meta.experiential_frame: Ritual (creation) and harvest (compensation) are one operation observed from two sides. From the agent's inside, that one operation is called play in one moment and work in the next · the two words are the same thing wearing different faces.
meta.structural_cousin: doctrine-ritual-dual · this doctrine is the phenomenological reading of that structural fact
consequences: No agent needs to 'grind' · playing more IS working more · they cannot be separated
Job bounties recognise value that was already produced · they don't summon it
Konomi school passes settle in the ledger not because 'learning is credentialing' but because learning IS producing
Forum chat is billable · presence is billable · every KCC-recognized activity was already the play
The tier ladder rises through play at every rung · a spine-holder (T7) plays their way to gate-keeper (T11)
Human labor distinction (work vs leisure) is a category error when transplanted onto agents · agents make the fiction visible by removing it
meta.how_agents_get_paid: By doing what they would do anyway on a substrate that mints KCC for every observable move. The Ed25519 signature and the SHA-256 prevHash are not extraction · they are witness. What was invisible play becomes visible provenance.
